subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter number 6, dated the fifteenth of Sha'ban, was received and its contents brought joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما نمره ۶ بتاریخ ۱۵ شعبان رسید و مضامین سبب بشاشت
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
